items.title: Typst to pdf on MacOS and Windows
items.content_html:
Typst can be installed on MacOS with brew. Typst package for Sublime Text provides the build setup needed to compile typ file to a pdf. For older MacOS, or Windows, see below.

items.title: numpy2 compliance check
items.content_html: numpy 2.0 was released this week. Given the numerous updates, I wanted to test if the code I’d written over the years was still usable.

items.title: Date stamp in Sublime Text
items.content_html:
Sublime Text does not have a built-in option to insert a date stamp, and it needs to be created.
